title: Mind Models
editorialSummary: Psychology concepts grouped by framework. False trail: Repression is a Freudian concept but also commonly discussed as a defence mechanism — placed in Freudian Concepts here as it is a foundational element of Freud's structural model. Confirmation Bias and Anchoring are cognitive biases; Dunning-Kruger and Halo Effect complete the group. Conditioning Types include Latent Learning (knowledge acquired without reinforcement, demonstrated later) alongside Classical, Operant, and Observational learning.
